task.title: Fix OpenClaw SEO canonical domain and improve metadata/crawl signals

events.content: Set the canonical domain and crawler metadata to agentrelay.dev: Set the canonical domain and crawler metadata to agentrelay.dev

raw.question: Set the canonical domain and crawler metadata to agentrelay.dev
raw.chosen: Set the canonical domain and crawler metadata to agentrelay.dev
raw.reasoning: The app had no metadata base and production deployment config still pointed at agentrelay.net, which could split ranking signals and generate incorrect canonicals. Route-level metadata plus sitemap/robots gives search engines a single preferred hostname and crawl path.

retrospective.summary: Updated OpenClaw SEO to use agentrelay.dev as the canonical host, added route metadata/open graph/twitter tags, generated sitemap and robots endpoints, improved the hosted skill page intro, and noindexed tokenized invite URLs; verified with a successful Next.js build.
